metadata.description: Social/marketing skills organized by BRAND (vertical slice) + generic tools. Each brand is a plugin; channels (LinkedIn, blog, Instagram, TikTok) are skills inside it; the voice lives in the slice, the mechanics in shared/.

plugins.name: marketing-tools
plugins.description: Generic, brand-agnostic SEO and Google Ads tools: brand-voice, content-writer, competitor-analysis, gap-zone, rank-tracker, ai-shopping, static-ads, ads-audit, waste-finder.
